antispoofing: <Audio> You are an audio security expert specialized in classifying audios as Real or Fake. You are tasked with detecting whether an audio is Real (genuine) or Fake (generated artificially). Is the provided audio Real or Fake? Give response in format: Final Answer: [Real/Fake]. Do not use markdown or any other formatting and output the answer as specified.

<Audio> Determine if this audio is Real or Fake using forensic analysis. Perform a systematic audio forensic analysis: 1. SPECTRAL ANALYSIS: Examine spectrogram for unnatural patterns, spectral discontinuities, or inconsistent formant structures. 2. PROSODY PATTERNS: Analyze pitch contours, speech rate consistency, and naturalness of intonation. 3. ARTIFACT DETECTION: Look for digital artifacts at segment boundaries, unnatural silences, or inconsistent background noise. 4. VOICE QUALITY: Assess breathiness, vibrato patterns, and natural voice tremor. 5. ACOUSTIC CONSISTENCY: Check for consistent reverberation patterns and environmental noise. After analysis, provide: Final Answer: [Real/Fake]
